arabic: جَلَسْتُ فِي مَطْعَمٍ صَغِيرٍ قَرِيبٍ مِنَ الْفُنْدُقِ. نَاوَلَنِي النَّادِلُ قَائِمَةَ الطَّعَامِ وَانْتَظَرَ طَلَبِي. طَلَبْتُ شَوْرَبَةَ الْعَدَسِ وَطَبَقَ الْكُشَرِيِّ الْمَشْهُورِ. سَأَلَنِي إِذَا كُنْتُ أُرِيدُ شَيْئًا لِلشُّرْبِ فَطَلَبْتُ عَصِيرَ بُرْتُقَالٍ. كَانَ الطَّعَامُ لَذِيذًا وَالسِّعْرُ مَعْقُولًا جِدًّا.
translation: Sjeo sam u mali restoran blizu hotela. Konobar mi je donio jelovnik i čekao moj narudžbu. Naručio sam sočivo supu i poznato jelo kušari. Pitao me da li želim nešto za piće pa sam naručio sok od narandže. Hrana je bila ukusna, a cijena vrlo razumna.
translationEn: I sat down in a small restaurant near the hotel. The waiter handed me the menu and waited for my order. I ordered lentil soup and the famous koshary dish. He asked if I wanted something to drink, so I ordered orange juice. The food was delicious and the price was very reasonable.
